basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Female Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website Tata Memorial Centre. Has been announced through the TMC Female Nurse Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: General Nursing Midwifery and / or B.Sc. (Nursing)

salary_details.details: Rs. 33,000/- (GNM) / Rs. 35,000/- (B.Sc. Nursing) per month + Rs. 1,500/- per completed year of experience (upto 4 years)

selection_process: MCQ Test (if more applications) Walk-in Interview Document Verification
